title: every shader possible
description: every shader on modrinth, with the iris shader addon
body: Ever wanted access to a massive collection of shaders all in one place? This modpack gives you exactly that — a full selection of over 80 different shaders, carefully gathered from the entire shaders section on Modrinth Fabric. No need to search and download them one by one — they’re all here, pre-installed and ready to go. Whether you want realistic lighting, cinematic sunsets, or vibrant colors that make your Minecraft world look completely new, this pack has something for everyone. It even includes Iris Shaders, which lets you easily manage, switch, and customize your shaders without hassle. You can adjust performance settings, test visuals instantly, and find your perfect balance between beauty and FPS. This modpack is perfect for players who love experimenting with visuals, comparing shader styles, or simply upgrading the game’s look to the next level. Every shader is included, from lightweight ones for low-end PCs to ultra-realistic ones that push your system to the max. With this pack, you can make your Minecraft world look absolutely stunning — the way you’ve always imagined it. Download it, load it up, and start exploring your world like never before with the ultimate all-in-one shader collection!
